_doc: Lektions-Cover (thumbnail_url) — einheitlicher Hausstil, moderne Flat-Gouache. Personen-/textfrei, ein ikonisches Motiv pro Lektion. Von Claude verfasst (2026-06-13). Render via scripts/gen_cover_images.py.
style: Modern flat gouache poster illustration with subtle paper-grain texture and clean graphic shapes. Warm cream washi-paper background. Limited harmonious palette of soft indigo, muted sage green, warm ochre and gentle neutrals, with a SINGLE bright vermillion (shu red) accent used sparingly on one focal element only. Generous negative space, one or two large simple iconic objects, calm minimal balanced composition, soft flat shading, highly readable at small thumbnail size. Wide 16:9 framing.

covers.motif: a wooden Japanese soroban abacus seen at a gentle angle, a few neatly stacked round coins resting beside it, one coin glowing in vermillion
a small cozy traditional Japanese house at dusk with a single tree beside it and one warmly glowing vermillion window
a quiet tatami room with a rolled futon and a steaming tea cup, a stylized vermillion sun arc rising through a paper shoji window
a calligraphy brush resting across a black inkstone with a small water dropper, on a blank sheet of washi, a single vermillion seal-dot of pigment
an open blank calligraphy practice notebook with empty grid squares and a brush laid diagonally across it, a vermillion ribbon bookmark
a row of calligraphy brushes of different sizes hanging from a simple wooden brush rack, one brush tipped in vermillion
two indigo ink droplets falling into a still shallow water bowl, concentric ripples spreading, one ripple ring tinted vermillion
two calligraphy brushes crossing and overlapping, their ink strokes blending where they meet into a small vermillion bloom
a sleek angular bamboo dip-pen beside a small modern ink bottle on a clean surface, the bottle cap a bright vermillion
a small stack of imported parcels tied with string beside a wooden harbor crate, one parcel wrapped in vermillion paper
sharp angular geometric ink brush-strokes arranged like a tidy abstract signpost, one stroke in vermillion
a single long straight horizontal ink stroke stretched across blank washi with a small separate dash above it, the dash vermillion
a coffee cup and a slice of cake on a small café table, the cup rim accented in vermillion
a tidy arrangement of profession objects on a shelf: a chef's toque, a folded apron and a small toolbox, one item vermillion
an inviting dining table set with a covered donburi bowl, a small teapot and chopsticks on a rest, the bowl lid knob vermillion
a vintage black rotary telephone on a small side table, its cord curling gently, the dial center a vermillion dot
an elegant gift box wrapped in furoshiki cloth presented on a lacquer tray, the wrapping knot tied in vermillion fabric
a path of flat stepping stones receding into soft morning mist across still water, the nearest stone touched with vermillion moss
a chain of folded origami paper links joined together stretching across the frame, one link folded from vermillion paper
a minimalist flat city scene with a small train, a bank building and a single park tree as clean geometric shapes, the train roof vermillion
a calm wide sky with a soft sun, a drifting cloud and a single open umbrella below, the umbrella canopy vermillion
neat bundles of slim wooden counting rods tied in small groups resting on washi, one bundle's tie in vermillion
a relaxed grouping of hobby objects: an acoustic guitar, an open book and a soccer ball, the ball panel accents vermillion
a winding garden path reaching a crossroads with blank wooden direction-arrow signs pointing different ways, one arrow vermillion
seven small nature symbols arranged in a tidy row — a sun, a crescent moon, a flame, a water drop, a leafy tree, a gold coin and a mound of earth — the flame in vermillion
a family of three tea cups of descending size grouped warmly together on a tray, the smallest cup vermillion
a sweeping minimal landscape uniting a tall mountain, a winding river, a single tree and falling rain, one autumn leaf vermillion
a set of nested wooden boxes from large to small arranged on shelves at different heights, the smallest box vermillion
a row of six pairs of slippers in gently descending sizes lined up at a wooden genkan entryway, the smallest pair vermillion
a stack of round coins beside a small sand hourglass on a low table, the hourglass sand glowing vermillion
a contrasting still life: a tall slender vase next to a short round one, a new crisp object beside a weathered old one, one vase vermillion
a single blank name card standing in a small holder on a desk beside one delicate flower, the flower vermillion
a small teapot gently pouring a thread of tea into one waiting cup on a clean surface, the teapot lid knob vermillion
a wide sky arc showing a rising sun on one side and a crescent moon on the other over a low rooftop horizon, the sun vermillion
three identical small ceramic objects placed at near, middle and far distances along a wooden table receding into space, the nearest one vermillion
a large round wall clock with a completely blank plain face and two simple hands, the hour hand vermillion
